name: Sweet and Sour Onion Relish
recipeIngredient: 2 large onions (Vidalia or Walla Walla), halved and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 11-inch skillet (not nonstick), heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add onions and sugar. Cover and cook, stirring occasionally, until onions are soft and most of their liquid has evaporated, about 10 or 20 minutes.
3. Uncover and cook, stirring, until onions turn deep golden, an additional 10-20 minutes. If onions begin to scorch, add 1-2 tablespoons water.
4. Add garlic and rosemary; cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 3 minutes.
5. Season with salt, pepper, and more vinegar if desired. Refrigerate for up to 3 days.
